intro: AURELIUS / CXO — Biological Optimization Engine (BOE) v2.0
Operator-facing XLSX workspace for Captain Vlad’s AURELIUS protocol system (CAS/CPO/CLAB/HFMP/etc.). Designed to be LLM-compatible while remaining usable in Excel.

1) XLSX is the editable workspace.
2) JSONL export is the RAG/agent ingestion format (row-level items).
3) Stable IDs are sacred: never reuse an ID for a different meaning.
4) After edits, bump version and regenerate JSONL.
5) Avoid complex formulas/macros; prefer values/text to prevent Excel repair.

Each JSONL line corresponds to one row item from a sheet, with:
• sheet/tab, row index
• id (if present)
• data (column→value map)
• text (compact concatenation for embeddings)
Use filters like tab/sheet, phase, timing, tags, track (MAIN vs RESET).
If chat output conflicts with the workbook, the workbook wins. After edits, regenerate JSONL so machines see the same canonical state.
New: 16_TEMP_PHASE_STACK provides a phase-wise 'maximal menu' (CAS+CPO+COP) ranked by Strength/Safety for temporary protocol regeneration.
foundation_framework: - Responsibility: authority may be delegated, final responsibility remains with the Captain.
- Orientation: results-first, mechanistic, non-allopathic constrained by common sense safety.
- Core influences: Ray Peat, Georgi Dinkov, Danny Roddy, Longecity/Turnbuckle, Alex Kikel, Mark Hyman, Anthony Jay.
- Priorities: gut–liver axis, bile flow, endotoxin control, mitochondrial function, thyroid, dopamine, androgens, vascular/endothelial health.

- 10 axes describe target phenotype (androgen axis, dopamine axis, thyroid axis, prolactin axis, histamine/VEGF axis, mitochondrial axis, endothelial axis, gut–liver axis, neurosteroid axis, fascia/connective tissue axis).
- CPO: Canonical Protocol Object (phase-timeline of what to do and when).
- CAS: Canonical Agent/Supplement library (all compounds and their properties).
- COP: Canonical Operator Practices (exercises, Angion, pelvic work, PBM, etc.).
- All stable changes must be encoded in this workbook.
- Regenerated protocols should reference the latest workbook as ground truth rather than memory or prior chat.
project_overview: Project Description
AURELIUS Protocol / HFMP Optimization
Unified database including all canonical objects.
Follow instructions to update and version this file.
ALDH & Fungal Terrain Module (v1.15+)
Working hypothesis: partial ALDH downregulation + fungal overgrowth + cholestasis drive a cluster of symptoms (low libido, anosmia, fatigue, SD).
Objectives:
- Lower aldehyde load from gut/fungal sources (acetaldehyde, DOPAL).
- Support ALDH cofactors (molybdenum, thiamine, zinc, NAD+).
- Upregulate ALDH expression via Nrf2 (sulforaphane).
Key tools (wired into CPO):
- CAS-FUNG-01 Undecylenic Acid – primary antifungal for cholestatic terrain in Phase 1.0–1.5.
- CAS-LIV-04 TUDCA – low-dose bile acid support introduced in late Phase 1.0 once bowel motility and binders are stable.
- CAS-B-01 Niacinamide – NAD+ / ALDH support in Phase 1.5.
- CAS-INF-02 Sulforaphane – Nrf2/ALDH activation in Phase 1.5.
- CAS-MITO-15 Methylene Blue – optional low-dose mitochondrial/dopaminergic accelerator in Phase 1.5+.
Optional / library tools (not in base CPO):
- CAS-FUNG-02 Nystatin – gut-local antifungal (Rx).
- CAS-BIND-02 Cholestyramine – rescue bile resin for acute bile/toxin events.
- CAS-NEURO-16 Intranasal Insulin – experimental neuro-metabolic reset for stalled anosmia/libido (Phase 3+ only).
This module is tightly linked to: CFS-05 (Microglia), CFS-06 (Smell–Libido Axis), CFS-10 (Cholestasis) and HFMP axes 2 (Dopamine), 6 (Mitochondria), 8 (Gut–Liver), 9 (Neurosteroids).
Canonical Human-Readable Daily View (v1.20+)
- Sheet: 12_Daily_By_Phase is the self-contained daily checklist per phase.
- It is canonical: whenever CPO/COP/CAS changes, update 12_Daily_By_Phase to match (avoid chat drift).
- Each phase repeats prior-phase items and consolidates timing to minimize daily dosing events when practical.
- Sheet: 13_Daily_MVP_By_Phase is the 'Minimum Viable' self-contained daily spine per phase (compressed dosing events).
- 01_CPO includes Tier + continuation metadata (CarryForward / Stop-Taper Trigger / Maintenance Frequency) to manage de-bloat and tapering.
- 12_Daily_By_Phase now displays continuation + maintenance guidance inline per item (so phases stay self-contained without implying 'forever').
- Rule: When systems stabilize (see stop/taper triggers), shift items from daily → maintenance/PRN as indicated.
